## What this PR does

One or two sentences. What changed, and why.

## Linked issue

Closes #...

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Docs / tests / chore

## Testing

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] If touching UI: smoke-tested on at least one OS
- [ ] If touching audio/STT/AL: confirmed the threading rules in [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md#threading-rules-read-this-before-touching-audiosttal) still hold

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, hard-coded private IPs, or personal data in the diff
